name: Sc Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients until just combined.
2. Shape into a flat pancake and bake in a moderate oven for about 10 to 20 minutes, or until golden brown.
Notes: Exact temperature not specified. Moderate is typically between 350°F and 400°F (175°C and 200°C).
Source: Boxbury Grage, Morgan County, OH
